snippet.title: Uncovering the Surprising Truth About Funding What You Didn't Know #shorts
snippet.description:
Uncovering the Surprising Truth About Funding What You Didn't Know #shorts 

Kurt Walker hosts Who's Got My Money - Gameshow edition, to demonstrate how to learn to play the game of fundraising, both in learning where the money is, finding alignment with the right capital allocators and in raising capital from them.

Kurt is a community builder, entrepreneur, and co-founder of Captal Platform, C3: Conscious Creator's Community, SPICE Nation, and One Tree Wealth.

What the full video here - https://youtu.be/0EmHRkZMh1M

If you enjoy this video, then please subscribe to our channel.

💗 Support our mission to strengthen communities by bringing people together, fostering a creative class, and creating an inclusive, diverse, and innovative technology and startup culture - https://donorbox.org/tech-alley-bringing-the-tech-and-startup-scenes-together-fund

Follow Tech Alley!
Twitter: https://twitter.com/TechAlleyEvents
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/techalleyevents/
Website: https://www.techalley.org/

Tech Alley is a non-profit (501c3) created to build and support local technology and startup communities by hosting full-day monthly events showcasing a variety of meetups, speakers, and workshops that attracts people of all interests, ages, and skill level to a diverse and welcoming startup scene. Tech Alley events have been a catalyst for the development of talent, ideas, mentorship, innovation, creativity, and a culture that practices the Give First philosophy- all the components of a vibrant entrepreneur ecosystems.

snippet.title: HOW DID UHURA WALK BACKWARDS SO FAR??? WOW! #starfleet #startrekonline #startrek #shortsfeed #shorts
snippet.description:
From Season two!
Entire episode playlists available on my youtube channel page!

Science fiction/Action adventure/Space. Created by Gene Roddenberry. Starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy, DeForest Kelley (Kirk, Spock and Dr. McCoy) - Norway Productions and Desilu Productions produced the series from September 1966 to December 1967. Paramount Television produced the show from January 1968 to June 1969. Star Trek aired on NBC from September 8, 1966, to June 3, 1969. It was first broadcast on September 6, 1966, on Canada's CTV network. Star Trek's Nielsen ratings while on NBC were low, and the network cancelled it after three seasons and 79 episodes. Several years later, the series became a hit in broadcast syndication, remaining so throughout the 1970s, achieving cult classic status and a developing influence on popular culture. Star Trek eventually spawned a franchise, consisting of eight television series, 13 feature films, and numerous books, games, and toys, and is now widely considered one of the most popular and influential television series of all time.


All rights go to Gene Roddenberry, I’m available and open to say that there was no copyright infringement intended. This is for @StarTrekTOS where I found a place to post the BEST of the BEST clips from The Original Series! Trekkies of all callings are welcome :)

localized.title: HOW DID UHURA WALK BACKWARDS SO FAR??? WOW! #starfleet #startrekonline #startrek #shortsfeed #shorts
localized.description:
From Season two!
Entire episode playlists available on my youtube channel page!

Science fiction/Action adventure/Space. Created by Gene Roddenberry. Starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy, DeForest Kelley (Kirk, Spock and Dr. McCoy) - Norway Productions and Desilu Productions produced the series from September 1966 to December 1967. Paramount Television produced the show from January 1968 to June 1969. Star Trek aired on NBC from September 8, 1966, to June 3, 1969. It was first broadcast on September 6, 1966, on Canada's CTV network. Star Trek's Nielsen ratings while on NBC were low, and the network cancelled it after three seasons and 79 episodes. Several years later, the series became a hit in broadcast syndication, remaining so throughout the 1970s, achieving cult classic status and a developing influence on popular culture. Star Trek eventually spawned a franchise, consisting of eight television series, 13 feature films, and numerous books, games, and toys, and is now widely considered one of the most popular and influential television series of all time.


All rights go to Gene Roddenberry, I’m available and open to say that there was no copyright infringement intended. This is for @StarTrekTOS where I found a place to post the BEST of the BEST clips from The Original Series! Trekkies of all callings are welcome :)

snippet.title: Secrets of the Investment World Uncovering Unlimited Capital and Distressed Asset Shopping #shorts
snippet.description:
Secrets of the Investment World Uncovering Unlimited Capital and Distressed Asset Shopping #shorts 

Kurt Walker hosts Who's Got My Money - Gameshow edition, to demonstrate how to learn to play the game of fundraising, both in learning where the money is, finding alignment with the right capital allocators and in raising capital from them.

Kurt is a community builder, entrepreneur, and co-founder of Captal Platform, C3: Conscious Creator's Community, SPICE Nation, and One Tree Wealth.

What the full video here - https://youtu.be/0EmHRkZMh1M

If you enjoy this video, then please subscribe to our channel.

💗 Support our mission to strengthen communities by bringing people together, fostering a creative class, and creating an inclusive, diverse, and innovative technology and startup culture - https://donorbox.org/tech-alley-bringing-the-tech-and-startup-scenes-together-fund

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/techalleyevents/
Website: https://www.techalley.org/

Tech Alley is a non-profit (501c3) created to build and support local technology and startup communities by hosting full-day monthly events showcasing a variety of meetups, speakers, and workshops that attracts people of all interests, ages, and skill level to a diverse and welcoming startup scene. Tech Alley events have been a catalyst for the development of talent, ideas, mentorship, innovation, creativity, and a culture that practices the Give First philosophy- all the components of a vibrant entrepreneur ecosystems.

snippet.title: Interview with Kurt Walker - Boosting Local Business and Startup Success in Nevada
snippet.description:
Join Cindy Birkland and Kurt Walker in an enlightening conversation about boosting local businesses and startup success right here in Nevada. Discover how we're revolutionizing the game of money for founders, funders, and the entire venture ecosystem. 🚀

🌐 Learn more at CindyBirkland.com

🎙️ In this episode of Naked Money, we discuss:

🔍 Simplifying and automating the fundraising process.
💼 The importance of building world-class teams.
🎥 The future of content tech and social tech in Las Vegas.
🌟 Making Nevada the business capital of the world.
👥 Join our community of entrepreneurs, investors, and innovators, and be part of the journey towards a thriving Nevada!

Hashtags:
#NakedMoney #StartupSuccess #Entrepreneurship #VentureCapital #Founders #NevadaBusiness #TechInnovation #ContentTech #SocialTech #BusinessCommunity #LasVegas #businesscapital 

Cindy Birkland is known for her “no nonsense” approach to savings and investing. Her fun and yet educational money workshops and seminars are not to be missed! Cindy lives in Henderson, NV and is licensed in over 7 states as a Financial Representative and Selling Agent for NIW. 

=================================
 LET'S CONNECT ON SOCIAL: 
Website: www.cindybirkland.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cindy_birkland/
FB: https://www.facebook.com/cindy_birkland-102795295689468/LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cindybirkland/
Please visit our YouTube channel and subscribe
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQo9rIrTyG3FxlGtKvNLAWQ?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: #kristnovoselic FUNNY Escalator Rant 😂 #nirvana #shorts
snippet.description:
In this Nirvana interview, Krist Novoselic explains his dislike for 'standers' on escalators, and advocates for everyone to be 'walkers' instead 😂. 

Check out this video for a breakdown of Escalator Etiquette: https://youtu.be/vbsoO2c7gCM

Like and subscribe for more insightful shorts about Nirvana and other music Legends!
